description_long: This is a modern, armless chaise with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular seat and backrest upholstered in a burnt orange fabric. The backrest is medium height and includes a distinctive horizontal cutout near the base, adding a contemporary touch. The seat and backrest are supported by a slender, black metal frame with four straight legs, slightly angled for stability. The rear of the chaise is finished in a contrasting dark material, likely a protective or structural backing. The upholstery appears smooth and unpatterned, with a firm, semi-soft surface. This piece is suitable for urban public spaces such as parks, plazas, or waiting areas, offering comfortable seating for two people.
description: A modern, armless chaise with burnt orange upholstery, a horizontal cutout in the backrest, and a black metal frame. The design is minimalist and suitable for urban public seating.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and backrest, highlighting the horizontal cutout and the armless, open design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the slight backward angle of the backrest and the slender, angled metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark backing of the chaise and the supporting frame, with the cutout visible at the lower part of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the profile of the seat, backrest, and metal legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, rectangular, and features a horizontal cutout near the base, giving it a modern and distinctive appearance. It is smoothly upholstered with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, slightly angled outward for stability, with a minimalist and functional design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid burnt orange with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both attached and integrated into the frame, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
